data.text/markdown:
Fashion MNIST — Parallel Coordinates

This notebook loads the Fashion MNIST dataset, reduces the 784 pixel features down to a handful of PCA components, and visualizes them with an interactive parallel coordinates plot. Use the brushes on each axis to filter and explore how different clothing categories separate in PCA space.
